objectives: Create structured web pages using Html
Style layouts and typography using CSS
Produce simple learning materials as digital content
learning_path.title: Web Foundations with Html and CSS

objectives: Write core JavaScript syntax and control flow
Manipulate page behavior with JavaScript
Create short practice exercises as digital content
learning_path.title: JavaScript Essentials for Interactive Pages

objectives: Explain the request/response model in Http
Use JavaScript to call Rest Apis and handle responses
Document API calls and examples as digital content
learning_path.title: HTTP Basics and Working with Rest Apis

objectives: Write basic Sql queries for reading and modifying data
Model simple relational data structures
Apply Database Design And Normalization to reduce redundancy
learning_path.title: SQL Fundamentals and Database Design Basics

objectives: Create a basic server using Node.Js
Implement Rest Apis endpoints
Connect API endpoints to Sql queries
learning_path.title: Node.Js for Building Simple APIs

objectives: Implement Authentication And Authorization (Jwt, Oauth2) flows at a high level
Protect Rest Apis endpoints using token-based access
Explain common authorization patterns in API design
learning_path.title: Authentication and Authorization with JWT and OAuth2

objectives: Build user interfaces using React components
Manage basic component state and rendering
Consume Rest Apis from a React UI
learning_path.title: React Fundamentals for UI Development

objectives: Add TypeScript to an existing React codebase
Define types for component props, state, and API responses
Reduce runtime errors by using TypeScript in key modules
learning_path.title: Add TypeScript to a React Project

matched_occupation.description: Web developers develop, implement and document web-accessible software based on the designs provided. They align the client's web presence with its business strategy, troubleshoot software problems and issues and look for ways to improve the application.
matched_occupation.label: web developer
